attributes.action: We need a general election now.
attributes.additional_details: The people have had enough. Britain is broken and needs fixing fast
attributes.background:
Labour cannot run this country after duch a disastrous local election. Starmer has lost the support of the country and his MPs

 His position is now untenable

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
